changes: Implemented a fully responsive, icon-driven status card system for Dashboard and Inventory on mobile devices.
Unified the metrics grid into a high-density 4-column layout on mobile for maximum information utility.
Removed horizontal scrolling on mobile by strictly fitting all layout containers to the viewport.
Added automatic switching between icon-only (Mobile) and text+description (PC) views for all status metrics.
Optimized Inventory Management buttons into compact icon-only circular buttons on mobile.
Scaled down typography and icon sizes for better fit and readability on small screens.
